features: SOFTEN AND HYDRATE: Nuagé Aqueous Lotion helps smooth, soften and hydrate skin with easy everyday care. Use it after washing, after a shower or whenever skin feels dry and in need of comfort.

COCOA BUTTER EXTRACTS: Enriched with cocoa butter extracts, this lotion helps skin feel comforted and cared for. It is a lovely choice for daily use when skin needs moisture and a softer, smoother feel.
RICH CREAM TEXTURE: With a richer texture than a lotion, this cream feels comforting on the skin and easy to apply. It is a practical choice for daily moisturising routines at home.
MOISTURISER AND CLEANSER: This versatile Aqueous Cream can be used as a moisturiser or as a cleanser instead of soap. It is a handy option for simple routines that care for skin in more than one way.

DERMATOLOGICALLY TESTED CARE: Dermatologically Tested for added reassurance, this cream fits neatly into daily skincare. It is a dependable choice for keeping skin feeling soft, calm and well looked after.
DAILY COMFORT FOR DRY SKIN: When skin feels dry, tight or rough, this cream helps bring back softness and comfort. It is ideal for everyday use through changing weather and regular wash routines.
description: Product Description Nuagé Aqueous Cream with Cocoa Butter Extracts is a practical everyday skincare essential designed to smooth, soften and hydrate skin with ease. With a rich cream texture, it helps leave skin feeling softer, more comfortable and well cared for, making it a useful addition to daily routines. Whether used after washing, after a shower, before bed or whenever skin feels dry and tight, it brings simple, fuss-free care to the day. Enriched with cocoa butter extracts, this Moisturising Cream adds an extra sense of comfort to regular skincare, as well having a natural summer scent. It is ideal for helping skin feel nourished and soft, especially when dryness leaves it feeling rough or uncomfortable. The cream texture makes it pleasant to apply and easy to work into a daily routine, whether kept in the bathroom, by the sink or close at hand for everyday use. This versatile Nuagé Aqueous Cream can also be used as a cleanser instead of soap, making it a handy all-rounder for simple skincare. As a moisturiser, it helps soften and hydrate the skin. As a cleanser, it offers a gentler way to wash while helping to avoid that stripped, dry feeling. Dermatologically Tested for added reassurance, this 350ml cream is a smart choice for anyone looking for dependable daily skincare with cocoa butter extracts and comforting moisture. Directions Apply a small amount to the affected area and massage gently. Manufacturer Contact Information Nuage Aqueous Cream With Cocoa Butter Resealable Pot 350ml See more
